current_status_next_steps:
1. Intialize the zonelet yaml in MON-AZ1
# gt -Z <path>/zonelet.yml

2. Set Variable on deployer
# LOCAL_NODE1="mon1-qz1-sr1-rk010-s48-sn1";LOCAL_NODE2="mon1-qz1-sr1-rk010-s48-sn2";RNODE="mon1-qz1-sr1-rk009-s10-sn2";SG1="ecc763d4-e34e-4a77-82a8-1eb7bef39a18";PORT="63cc745e-72a4-4b04-bf52-b5db70ba3488"


3. VALIDATION : 

# gt ${RNODE} "ccc get remote_ports ${PORT} -f "
# gt ${LOCAL_NODE1} "ccc get local_ports ${PORT} -f " ====> local port will not exist
# gt ${LOCAL_NODE2} "ccc get local_ports ${PORT} -f " ====> local port will not exist
# gt ${RNODE} "ccc get  security_group ${SG1} -f| grep ${PORT}"

4. MITIGATION: 

# gt -t 120 ${RNODE} "ccc remove_security_group_members ${SG1} ${PORT}"
# gt -t 120 ${RNODE} "ccc delete_remote_port ${PORT}"

5. RE-VALIDATE 
# gt ${RNODE} "ccc get remote_ports ${PORT} -f " ====> remort port will not exist
# gt ${LOCAL_NODE1} "ccc get local_ports ${PORT} -f "====> local port will not exist
# gt ${LOCAL_NODE2} "ccc get local_ports ${PORT} -f "  ====> local port will not exist
# gt ${RNODE} "ccc get  security_group ${SG1} -f| grep ${PORT}"
